    A

    addCookie(HttpServletResponse, String, String, int) - Static method in class com.aptcoursework.utils.CookieUtil
    Utility method for creating and adding an HTTP cookie to the response.
    addRating(Rating) - Method in interface com.aptcoursework.dao.RatingDao
     
    addRating(Rating) - Method in class com.aptcoursework.dao.RatingDaoImpl
    Adds a new rating record to the database.
    addToCart(int, int) - Method in interface com.aptcoursework.dao.cartDao
     
    addToCart(int, int) - Method in class com.aptcoursework.dao.cartDaoImpl
    Adds a laptop to the user's cart or increments quantity if already present.
    ADMIN - Enum constant in enum class com.aptcoursework.enums.Role
     
    Architecture: - Section in package com.aptcoursework.controller
     
    AuthenticationFilter - Section in package com.aptcoursework.controller.filter
     
    AuthenticationFilter - Class in com.aptcoursework.controller.filter
    Servlet filter responsible for handling authentication and access control across the entire web application.

    C

    Cart - Section in package com.aptcoursework.entity
     
    Cart - Class in com.aptcoursework.entity
    Represents a shopping cart item linking a user to a laptop product.
    Cart(int, int, int) - Constructor for class com.aptcoursework.entity.Cart
    Constructs a Cart instance with user, laptop, and quantity details.
    Cart(int, int, int, int) - Constructor for class com.aptcoursework.entity.Cart
    Constructs a Cart instance with all fields including database-assigned cart ID.
    cartDao - Interface in com.aptcoursework.dao
    Data Access Object (DAO) interface for managing Cart-related database operations.
    cartDaoImpl - Class in com.aptcoursework.dao
    Implementation class for the cartDao interface.
    cartDaoImpl() - Constructor for class com.aptcoursework.dao.cartDaoImpl
     
    CartServlet - Class in com.aptcoursework.controller
    Servlet handling shopping cart operations and management.
    CartServlet() - Constructor for class com.aptcoursework.controller.CartServlet
     
    checkPassword(String, String) - Static method in class com.aptcoursework.utils.PasswordUtil
    Verifies whether a plain-text password matches a previously hashed password.
    closeConnection(Connection) - Static method in class com.aptcoursework.utils.DatabaseConnection
    Closes the given database connection safely.
    com.aptcoursework.controller - package com.aptcoursework.controller
    Controller layer package for handling HTTP requests and responses in the APT Coursework application.
    com.aptcoursework.controller.filter - package com.aptcoursework.controller.filter
    Filter package containing servlet filters for cross-cutting concerns in the APT Coursework application.
    com.aptcoursework.dao - package com.aptcoursework.dao
    Data Access Object (DAO) layer package for the APT Coursework application.
    com.aptcoursework.entity - package com.aptcoursework.entity
    Entity package containing domain model objects for the APT Coursework application.
    com.aptcoursework.enums - package com.aptcoursework.enums
    Enumeration package containing type-safe constants for the APT Coursework application.
    com.aptcoursework.utils - package com.aptcoursework.utils
    Utility package containing helper classes for common operations in the APT Coursework application.
    CookieUtil - Section in package com.aptcoursework.utils
     
    CookieUtil - Class in com.aptcoursework.utils
    Utility class for handling HTTP cookie operations.
    CookieUtil() - Constructor for class com.aptcoursework.utils.CookieUtil
     
    countAllCustomers() - Method in interface com.aptcoursework.dao.UserDao
     
    countAllCustomers() - Method in class com.aptcoursework.dao.UserDaoImpl
    Counts the total number of users with the CUSTOMER role.
    countAllOrders() - Method in interface com.aptcoursework.dao.OrdersDao
     
    countAllOrders() - Method in class com.aptcoursework.dao.OrdersDaoImpl
    Counts the total number of orders in the system.
    countLaptopsFilterSearch(String, String, String, String) - Method in interface com.aptcoursework.dao.LaptopDao
     
    countLaptopsFilterSearch(String, String, String, String) - Method in class com.aptcoursework.dao.LaptopDaoImpl
    Counts the number of laptops that match the given search and filter criteria.
    CUSTOMER - Enum constant in enum class com.aptcoursework.enums.Role

    Servlet handling the admin dashboard with user and order statistics.

    deleteByLaptopID(int) - Method in class com.aptcoursework.dao.LaptopDaoImpl
     
    deleteCookie(HttpServletResponse, String) - Static method in class com.aptcoursework.utils.CookieUtil
    Deletes a cookie from the client's browser.
    deleteItem(int, int) - Method in interface com.aptcoursework.dao.cartDao
     
    deleteItem(int, int) - Method in class com.aptcoursework.dao.cartDaoImpl
    Deletes a laptop item completely from the user's cart.
    deleteRatingByLaptopID(int) - Method in interface com.aptcoursework.dao.RatingDao
     
    deleteRatingByLaptopID(int) - Method in class com.aptcoursework.dao.RatingDaoImpl
    Deletes all ratings associated with a specific laptop ID.
    deleteRatingByUserID(int, int) - Method in interface com.aptcoursework.dao.RatingDao
     
    deleteRatingByUserID(int, int) - Method in class com.aptcoursework.dao.RatingDaoImpl
    Deletes a specific rating given by a user for a particular laptop.
    deleteUserByID(int) - Method in interface com.aptcoursework.dao.UserDao
     
    deleteUserByID(int) - Method in class com.aptcoursework.dao.UserDaoImpl
    Deletes a user from the database using the user's ID.

    Dependencies: - Section in package com.aptcoursework.dao
     
    Dependencies: - Section in package com.aptcoursework.entity
     
    Dependencies: - Section in package com.aptcoursework.enums

    Design Patterns: - Section in package com.aptcoursework.utils
     
    Design Principles: - Section in package com.aptcoursework.entity
     
    doFilter(ServletRequest, ServletResponse, FilterChain) - Method in class com.aptcoursework.controller.filter.AuthenticationFilter
    Intercepts and processes incoming HTTP requests for authentication and access control.
    doGet(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse) - Method in class com.aptcoursework.controller.CartServlet
    Handles GET requests for cart operations.
    doGet(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse) - Method in class com.aptcoursework.controller.DashboardServlet
    Handles HTTP GET requests for the dashboard page.
    doGet(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse) - Method in class com.aptcoursework.controller.HomeServlet
    Handles GET requests by retrieving featured laptops and displaying the home page.
    doGet(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse) - Method in class com.aptcoursework.controller.LoginServlet
    Handles GET requests by displaying the login page.
    doGet(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse) - Method in class com.aptcoursework.controller.LogoutServlet
    Handles GET requests by invalidating the user session and redirecting to login page.
    doGet(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse) - Method in class com.aptcoursework.controller.OrderServlet
    Handles GET requests by retrieving user orders or individual order details.
    doGet(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse) - Method in class com.aptcoursework.controller.ProductsServlet
    Handles HTTP GET requests for product listing, filtering, pagination, and product add page navigation.
    doGet(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse) - Method in class com.aptcoursework.controller.ProductViewServlet
    Handles GET requests by retrieving and displaying detailed product information.
    doGet(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse) - Method in class com.aptcoursework.controller.RatingReviewServlet
    Handles GET requests by retrieving ratings for a product and calculating statistics.
    doGet(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse) - Method in class com.aptcoursework.controller.RegisterServlet
    Handles GET requests by displaying the registration form page.
    doPasswordsMatch(String, String) - Static method in class com.aptcoursework.utils.ValidationUtil
    Checks whether two passwords match.
    doPost(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse) - Method in class com.aptcoursework.controller.CartServlet
    Handles POST requests for cart operations.
    doPost(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse) - Method in class com.aptcoursework.controller.DashboardServlet
    Handles HTTP POST requests for user-related dashboard actions.
    doPost(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse) - Method in class com.aptcoursework.controller.LoginServlet
    Handles POST requests by validating user credentials and creating a session upon successful authentication.
    doPost(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse) - Method in class com.aptcoursework.controller.OrderServlet
    Handles HTTP POST requests for placing an order.
    doPost(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse) - Method in class com.aptcoursework.controller.ProductsServlet
    Handles POST requests for adding and editing laptop products.
    doPost(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse) - Method in class com.aptcoursework.controller.ProductViewServlet
     
    doPost(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse) - Method in class com.aptcoursework.controller.RatingReviewServlet
    Handles HTTP POST requests for adding and updating product ratings.
    doPost(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse) - Method in class com.aptcoursework.controller.RegisterServlet
    Handles POST requests by validating registration input and creating a new user account.

    Retrieves a specific order by ID with security verification.
    fetchOrdersByUser(int) - Method in interface com.aptcoursework.dao.OrdersDao
     
    fetchOrdersByUser(int) - Method in class com.aptcoursework.dao.OrdersDaoImpl
    Retrieves all orders for a specific user, ordered by creation date (newest first).

    K

    Key Responsibilities: - Section in package com.aptcoursework.dao
     

    L

    Laptop - Section in package com.aptcoursework.entity
     
    Laptop - Class in com.aptcoursework.entity
    Represents a laptop product entity with detailed specifications, pricing, and metadata.
    Laptop() - Constructor for class com.aptcoursework.entity.Laptop
    Default constructor that creates an empty Laptop instance.
    Laptop(int, String, String, String, String, String, String, String, String, String, String, String, String, String, String, String, String, String, String, BigDecimal, Integer, Integer, String, Integer, String, Integer, LocalDateTime, LocalDateTime) - Constructor for class com.aptcoursework.entity.Laptop
    Constructs a complete Laptop instance with all fields including database identifiers and metadata.
    Laptop(String, String, String, String, String, String, String, String, String, String, String, String, String, BigDecimal, Integer, Integer, Integer, String, Integer, String) - Constructor for class com.aptcoursework.entity.Laptop
    Constructs a Laptop instance with essential product and specification details.
    laptopAssginer(ResultSet) - Method in class com.aptcoursework.dao.LaptopDaoImpl
    Laptop assginer laptop.
    LaptopDao - Interface in com.aptcoursework.dao
    Data Access Object (DAO) interface for managing Laptop entities.
    LaptopDaoImpl - Class in com.aptcoursework.dao
    Data Access Object (DAO) implementation for managing Laptop entities.
    LaptopDaoImpl() - Constructor for class com.aptcoursework.dao.LaptopDaoImpl

    Servlet handling user authentication and login functionality.

    Servlet handling user logout functionality.
    LogoutServlet() - Constructor for class com.aptcoursework.controller.LogoutServlet

    Counts the number of laptops that are either low stock or out of stock.

    M

    Main Servlet Components: - Section in package com.aptcoursework.controller
     

    O

    OrderItems - Section in package com.aptcoursework.entity
     
    OrderItems - Class in com.aptcoursework.entity
    Represents an individual line item in a customer order.
    OrderItems(int, int, int, BigDecimal) - Constructor for class com.aptcoursework.entity.OrderItems
    Constructs an OrderItems instance with order, laptop, quantity, and price details.
    OrderItemsDao - Interface in com.aptcoursework.dao
    Data Access Object (DAO) interface for managing OrderItems-related database operations.
    orderItemsDaoImpl - Class in com.aptcoursework.dao
    Implementation class for the OrderItemsDao interface.
    orderItemsDaoImpl() - Constructor for class com.aptcoursework.dao.orderItemsDaoImpl
     
    Orders - Section in package com.aptcoursework.entity
     
    Orders - Class in com.aptcoursework.entity
    Represents a customer order containing one or more laptop products.
    Orders() - Constructor for class com.aptcoursework.entity.Orders
    Default constructor that creates an empty Orders instance.
    Orders(int, double, String, Timestamp) - Constructor for class com.aptcoursework.entity.Orders
    Constructs an Orders instance without a database-assigned order ID.
    Orders(int, int, double, String, Timestamp, Timestamp, String) - Constructor for class com.aptcoursework.entity.Orders
    Constructs a complete Orders instance with all fields including database-assigned order ID.
    OrdersDao - Interface in com.aptcoursework.dao
    Data Access Object (DAO) interface for managing Order-related database operations.
    OrdersDaoImpl - Class in com.aptcoursework.dao
    Implementation class for the OrdersDao interface.

    Servlet handling order display, management, and retrieval.
